key_insight: ESPO speeds up PPO for math reasoning by stopping rollouts early once a trajectory is likely to have failed, instead of wasting compute on useless tokens.
engineering_relevance: This reduces training cost and noise in advantage estimates, making RL fine-tuning of large language models more efficient and potentially more stable.
method: Detect failure online during generation using a surrogate regret computed from already available logits.
Smooth cumulative regret and stop when it significantly exceeds estimated values.
Treat truncated rollouts as absorbing failure states with a terminal reward to localize negative TD error near the failure step.
evidence_signal: On DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, ESPO improved over PPO on AIME 2024, AMC 2023, and MATH-500 while saving more than 20% of rollout tokens.
watch_item: Early stopping depends on a calibrated failure-detection threshold; if it is too aggressive or too lax, it may truncate useful reasoning or miss wasted compute.
